lines.text: Survival of the Fittest Center | Walt Disney World Resort
Survival of the Fittest Fitness Center
LocatedinDisney's Animal Kingdom Villas - Kidani VillageatDisney's Animal Kingdom Resort Area
Go wild within this full-service exercise facility featuring a selection of high-tech strength-training and cardio equipment.
Show Safety, Accessibility and Guest Policies
Operating Hours –
Workout Equipment

Go wild—and stay in shape—with high-tech fitness machines to keep you going strong. Located near Samawati Springs Pool in Kidani Village, Survival of the Fittest Fitness Center is home to Life Fitness cardio machines including treadmills, bicycles (regular and recumbent), ellipticals and stair climbers. Free weights and weight machines are also on site for those wanting to strength train while on vacation.
For your comfort, showers are located just across the way from the exercise room.
Know Before You Go
Find helpful information about hours of operation, facility requirements and more.
Requirements
Survival of the Fittest Fitness Center is complimentary for Guests staying at Disney’s Animal Kingdom Lodge.
Guests must be 14 years and older to use the fitness center. Guests 17 and younger must be accompanied by an adult or guardian.
Hours of Operation
Survival of the Fittest Fitness Center is open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. To utilize the health club, you will be required to use your MagicBand.
Lockers
Lockers are available for your convenience. However, valuables should be secured in your hotel safe.
